mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_device(tenant_id, org_id, product_key, device_name, address, device_key, device_type, secret, status, connect_status, protocol_type, protocol_version, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{productKey}, #{deviceName}, #{address}, #{deviceKey}, #{deviceType}, #{secret}, #{status}, #{connectStatus}, CASE WHEN #{protocolType} IS NULL OR #{protocolType} = '' THEN 'MQTT_ALINK_JSON' ELSE #{protocolType} END, #{protocolVersion}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_device WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM iot_device WHERE is_delete = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

sql.where:
AND is_delete = 0
AND ( device_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR device_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR product_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM iot_device
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM iot_device WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_device SET device_type = CASE WHEN #{deviceType} IS NULL OR #{deviceType} = '' THEN device_type ELSE #{deviceType} END, protocol_type = CASE WHEN #{protocolType} IS NULL OR #{protocolType} = '' THEN protocol_type ELSE #{protocolType} END, protocol_version = CASE WHEN #{protocolVersion} IS NULL OR #{protocolVersion} = '' THEN protocol_version ELSE #{protocolVersion} END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND device_key = #{deviceKey} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_device SET device_name = #{deviceName}, address = #{address}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND device_key = #{deviceKey} AND is_delete = 0

UPDATE iot_device SET connect_status = #{connectStatus}, last_connected_at = CASE WHEN #{connectStatus} = 'connected' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE last_connected_at END, last_disconnected_at = CASE WHEN #{connectStatus} = 'disconnected' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE last_disconnected_at END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND device_key = #{deviceKey} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_device SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0
